name: self-hosted-rivet
description: Root dev runner for self-hosted rivet wrapper

scripts.setup: npm --prefix wrapper/api install && npm --prefix wrapper/web install && corepack yarn --cwd rivet install
scripts.dev:docker: set COMPOSE_PARALLEL_LIMIT=1&& docker compose -f ops/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env.dev build && docker compose -f ops/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env.dev up --no-build
scripts.dev:docker:build: set COMPOSE_PARALLEL_LIMIT=1&& docker compose -f ops/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env.dev build
scripts.dev:local:executor: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs "corepack yarn --cwd rivet workspace @ironclad/rivet-app-executor run dev"
